content:
Edit: Covanent choice

I add this section in for players that is at ~ chapter 7 and want to use some covanent on their unit. and the recommendation I have for you is:

TRIPLE BURIAL GROUND on the supports until you unlock the life drain covanent from chapter 7, which then you run double burial ground on thais/ramona and Helot, crimson pulse on mouch and life drain on aigis.

CRIMSON PULSE IS BETTER THAN BURIAL GROUND ON MOUCHETTE.

Life drain is for Skey and Crimson is for crit rate, but why burial groud on thais/ramona and helot you ask.

well, aside from the DR it provides, its unique passive is extremely good for mouch team: Gain 50 aliemus on DR proc.

With this on Thais/ramona and helot, it basically means whenever you proc DR, you instantly have Exalt ready(or almost ready) on Mouch, thais and helot, which enable you to do another burst turn immediately.

Mouch team can make use of burial ground so well, so double burial ground is highly recommended.
